items.title: 👕 Worst to first: Ranking every World Cup shirt
items.summary: The 2026 World Cup will be the first with 48 teams. That means there'll be 96 kits on show! Here are all the ones released so far, from worst to first.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Dianna Russini: Salary, contract details in focus after The Athletic resignation over Mike Vrabel photos
items.summary: Dianna Russini’s salary isn’t official, but reports estimate she earned $1.5M–$2M at Athletic before her resignation. She was among its highest-paid writers.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: IPL 2026 schedule - fixtures and results
items.summary: Find out the 2026 IPL schedule, with the opening match on 28 March.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
